meta.title: HanaLoop website 2.0!
meta.contentFull:
## HanaLoop website 2.0 re-engineered and re-designed!

Our new website is up!

The original website was built on [eleventy](https://www.11ty.dev/) which I got fond due to its flexibility. Then I found [MDX](https://mdxjs.com/).

NextJS allows MDX + SSG combination.
Our product EcoLoop is built on Nextjs and Nextjs also has Static Site generation (SSG) capability.
